title: Food & Hunger
subtitle: Feeding a settlement, not a player

pages.text: Citizens do not automatically eat literal food items. Once Storage Logistics is understood, edible food in claimed storage contributes settlement food generation while it remains valid.
The food bar is the settlement's shared reserve and immigration progress. Stored valid food is a passive source that fills that bar over time; spoiled or poisoned food contributes nothing.
Starvation begins when citizens need food and the food bar is empty. Workers can keep the bar rising by putting real catches, crops, and meat into claimed storage.

pages.caption: Four ways to feed a tribe
